gist.headline: Caught on tape
gist.blurb: Added VCR snapshots to the enter service. Now our tests can replay history without the drama of live network calls.
gist.summary: Added 38 VCR snapshot recordings to the enter service to enable deterministic test replays.
gist.impact: Developers get faster, more reliable tests that don't depend on live external APIs.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot managing a library of VHS tapes (representing the VCR snapshots). The tapes are labeled with code snippets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art of the cute robot mascot organizing a stack of VHS tapes labeled with code symbols. Lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. The bee mascot watches curiously. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
